# Aloba Adewale — Multidisciplinary Designer

> Portfolio of Aloba Adewale, a multidisciplinary designer with 6+ years of professional experience.

## About
Aloba Adewale is a multidisciplinary designer based with expertise spanning branding and visual identity, motion design, 3D visualisation, and digital product design. With over 6 years of experience working across industries, Aloba brings a cross-disciplinary approach to every project — combining conceptual thinking with refined craft.

## Skills & Tools
- Branding & Visual Identity
- Motion Design & Animation
- 3D Visualisation & Rendering
- Digital Product & UI Design
- Adobe After Effects, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, Illustrator
- Figma, Blender
- AI-assisted design workflows

## Work
- Design Portfolio: https://linkly.link/2gOnp
- Motion Portfolio: https://vimeo.com/user142082803
- 3D Portfolio: https://linkly.link/2gOnx
